title: Distribution Projects Registry
description: Curated registry of OSS projects under distribution for the @adiled portfolio. Self-contained: tier, dossier path, and one-line note. Live state lives on GitHub and is reachable by clicking through.

$schema.description: URI of this schema. Optional pointer for editor tooling.

version.description: Schema version. Bump only on a structural change to this file's shape.

description.description: Free-text purpose statement for the registry.

projects.description: Array of curated projects. Each entry maps to one GitHub repo.

repo.description: GitHub repo in owner/name form. Example: adiled/ohlc-resample.

tier.description: Tier per policy.md §1. T1 anchor, T2 live, T3 pre-launch, T4 companion, T5 cultural or dormant.

dossier.description: Relative path to the project's distribution dossier markdown file.

note.description: One-line context to make the registry readable without opening the dossier. Optional but recommended.
